Bash(cd ~/Desktop && python3 << 'PYTHON_SCRIPT'
import os
from PIL import Image

# Find the file
files = os.listdir\('.'\)
target = None
for f in files:
    if '2026-02-24' in f and '19.04.38' in f:
        target = f
        break

if target:
    img = Image.open\(target\)
    print\(f"File: {target}"\)
    print\(f"Dimensions: {img.width}x{img.height}"\)
    print\(f"Format: {img.format}"\)
    print\(f"Mode: {img.mode}"\)
PYTHON_SCRIPT)

import os
import sys

# Get the actual filename
files = [f for f in os.listdir\('.'\) if '2026-02-24' in f and '19.04.38' in f and f.endswith\('.png'\)]
if files:
    filepath = os.path.abspath\(files[0]\)
    print\(f"Screenshot found at: {filepath}"\)
    
    # Check file exists and get size
    if os.path.exists\(filepath\):
        size = os.path.getsize\(filepath\)
        print\(f"File size: {size} bytes"\)
        print\(f"File exists: True"\)
PYTHON_SCRIPT)
